Off Calendar Jan-22-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No Appearances: The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: PLAINTIFF DEPARTMENT STORES NATIONAL BANK Motion To Deem Request For Admission Of Truth Of Facts Be Admitted is off calendar. Plaintiff has withdrawn the motion. Juge Pro Tem Tom Cohen, Clerk K. Liu, not reported. (D302/JPT)
